title: Alek327/Data-extraction-pipeline: v1.0.3
author: Oleksandr Galychyn
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Stable offline release of a rule-based pipeline for semi-automated qualitative evidence extraction from research PDFs. Includes deterministic classification, explicit inclusion/exclusion logic, audit-ready CSV outputs, optional Markdown synthesis, and strict/lenient review modes. No APIs or external services required.
 cycle_extraction_pipeline_offline.py
steps_raw:
Stable offline release of a rule-based pipeline for semi-automated qualitative evidence extraction from research PDFs. Includes deterministic classification, explicit inclusion/exclusion logic, audit-ready CSV outputs, optional Markdown synthesis, and strict/lenient review modes. No APIs or external services required.
